creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: If you have other options of cups-filters you feel should be options of the port itself, then I am all for it. As I mentioned on the ports mailing list, I am moving things over to a new computer and don't have the time at the moment to test this, so if you could also provide a log showing that this builds, I'll approve of the patch. I don't know if an exp-run needs to be done for this or not, though, so I have decided not to set that flag at all.
